docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORA, MIRIAN $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,465.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY JOSE PONCE.DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--IRMA MARTINEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY ESTRADA, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, MIRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAY-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, MIRIAN
